FR-01.title: Contact Management
requirements: Add contacts with name, email, phone, company

FR-02.title: Deal Pipeline
requirements: Create deals with value, stage, and close date
Multiple pipelines for different sales processes

FR-03.title: Activity Tracking
requirements: Activity timeline per contact and deal
acceptance_criteria: Activities logged with details and timestamp

FR-04.title: Email Integration
acceptance_criteria: Emails sent and logged on contact

FR-05.title: Task Management
requirements: Create tasks with due date and assignee

FR-07.title: Lead Scoring
requirements: Score leads based on configurable criteria
Score decay over time for inactivity

FR-08.title: Workflow Automation
requirements: Create automated workflows with triggers and actions
Triggers: deal stage change, new contact, score threshold
Actions: send email, create task, update field, notify

FR-09.title: Company Management
requirements: Create company records with industry and size

FR-10.title: Dashboard and Analytics
requirements: Key metrics: total deals, revenue, conversion rate
Export data to CSV and PDF

FR-12.title: API and Integrations
acceptance_criteria: API keys can be created and revoked

FR-01.title: Build Contact CRUD API
FR-01.description: Create REST endpoints for contacts: POST, GET (with search, filters, pagination), PATCH, DELETE. POST /api/contacts/import (CSV parser). POST /api/contacts/merge. Tag system with CRUD.

FR-01.title: Build Contact Management UI
FR-01.description: Create contact list with search, tag filters, and sort. Contact detail page with all fields, activity timeline, and deals. CSV import wizard with field mapping. Duplicate detection and merge dialog.

FR-01.title: Create Contact Database Schema
FR-01.description: Design contacts table: id, name, email, phone, company_id, tags (array), owner_id, source, created_at. Add indexes on email, company_id, tags. contact_merge_log for audit.

FR-02.title: Build Pipeline API
FR-02.description: Create CRUD for pipelines and stages. CRUD for deals: POST /api/deals, PATCH /api/deals/:id (update stage via drag-drop). Win probability per stage. Multiple pipeline support.

FR-02.title: Build Pipeline Board
FR-02.description: Create Kanban view with columns per stage. Deal cards showing name, value, company, close date. Drag-and-drop between stages. Pipeline selector dropdown. Deal detail slide-out panel.

FR-03.title: Build Activity API
FR-03.description: Create POST /api/activities (type: call/email/meeting, details, contact_id, deal_id). GET /api/contacts/:id/timeline (chronological). Schedule activities with reminder system.

FR-03.title: Build Activity UI
FR-03.description: Create activity log buttons (Log Call, Log Email, Log Meeting) with quick forms. Timeline component showing activities with icons. Schedule dialog with date/time and reminder toggle.

FR-04.title: Build Email Integration
FR-04.description: Create POST /api/emails/send (to contact, from template or custom). Template CRUD with merge fields. Track open/click via pixel and link wrapping. Gmail/Outlook OAuth sync.

FR-04.title: Build Email Composer
FR-04.description: Create email dialog with template selector, rich text editor, merge field insertion, and recipient from contact. Email tracking dashboard showing opens and clicks per email.

FR-05.title: Build Task API
FR-05.description: Create CRUD for tasks with assignee, due_date, priority, recurring config. GET /api/tasks with filters (assignee, status, priority, due date). Auto-create recurring task instances.

FR-05.title: Build Task UI
FR-05.description: Create task list with priority badges, due date, assignee avatar. Filter tabs: My Tasks, Overdue, Today, Upcoming. Task creation form with recurrence options.

FR-06.title: Build Reports API
FR-06.description: Create GET /api/reports/forecast (weighted pipeline), /api/reports/won-lost (analysis), /api/reports/leaderboard (team ranking), /api/reports/custom (query builder with filters).

FR-06.title: Build Reports Dashboard
FR-06.description: Create reports page with forecast bar chart, win/loss funnel, team leaderboard table, and custom report builder with dimension/measure selectors and chart type options.

FR-07.title: Build Lead Scoring Engine
FR-07.description: Create scoring service with configurable rules (field values, email opens, page visits). Behavior event tracking API. Time-based score decay job. Alert system at configurable threshold.

FR-07.title: Build Scoring Configuration UI
FR-07.description: Create scoring rules editor with criteria builder (field + operator + value = points). Behavior weights configuration. Decay settings. Threshold alert configuration.

FR-08.title: Build Workflow Engine
FR-08.description: Create workflow runner: triggers (deal_stage_change, new_contact, score_threshold), conditions (field checks), actions (send_email, create_task, update_field, notify). Execution queue with logging.

FR-08.title: Build Workflow Builder UI
FR-08.description: Create visual workflow builder with trigger selector, condition nodes, and action nodes connected by flow arrows. Save/activate toggle. Execution log viewer with status and timestamps.

FR-09.title: Build Company API
FR-09.description: Create CRUD for companies with industry, size, website. Link contacts via company_id. Parent/subsidiary relationships. GET /api/companies/:id/deals for aggregated deal data.

FR-09.title: Build Company Pages
FR-09.description: Create company list and detail pages. Detail shows company info, linked contacts, deals, and activity. Hierarchy tree view for parent/subsidiaries.

FR-10.title: Build Dashboard API
FR-10.description: Create GET /api/dashboard/widgets with configurable layouts. Widget data endpoints for metrics, charts, and goals. User-specific dashboard preferences.

FR-10.title: Build Customizable Dashboard
FR-10.description: Create dashboard with draggable widget grid. Widget types: metric card, bar chart, line chart, pie chart, goal progress. Add/remove/configure widgets. Export to CSV/PDF.

FR-11.title: Build RBAC System
FR-11.description: Create roles table with permissions matrix. Middleware for endpoint-level access control. Record ownership checks. Admin role management UI endpoints.

FR-11.title: Build Role Management UI
FR-11.description: Create admin settings page with role editor, permission matrix checkboxes, user role assignment, and data visibility rule configuration.

FR-12.title: Build Public API
FR-12.description: Create REST API with authentication via API keys. Rate limiting. Webhook system: configurable events, retry logic, and delivery logs. API key CRUD for users.

FR-12.title: Build API Settings Page
FR-12.description: Create developer settings with API key management (create, view, revoke), webhook configuration (URL, events, test), and API documentation link.
